meaning: vt.取代,替换,代替,把...放回原处
examples: Have they found anyone to replace her yet?
He headed off efforts to replace him as leader.
New laws will soon replace existing legislation.
Wardrop also leans on his suppliers to redesign any failed components rather than simply replace them.
Plans to replace stamp duty on properties sold in Scotland have been debated by MSPs at Holyrood.
